description: Energetic Dominican male voice with Caribbean cadence, fast-paced, confident
selectionNotes: Search ElevenLabs Voice Library for: Dominican, Caribbean, Latin male. Alternatively use Instant Voice Clone with a 30-second sample of Dominican speech.
notes: Low stability (0.4) = more expressive and varied. High style (0.6) = more character. This creates the energetic, animated Dominican personality.
